chroma_formats=420,422,444
pixel_formats=yuv420p,yuv420p10le,yuv422p10le,yuv444p10le

ffmpeg_wrapper_smoke_matrix=arm64:yuv420p,yuv420p10le,yuv422p10le,yuv444p10le;x86_64:yuv420p,yuv420p10le,yuv422p10le,yuv444p10le
